# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: A VPC with public and private subnets for a three-tier application

Resources:
  MyVPC:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        Name: MyVPC

  InternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateways.InternetGateway

  VPCRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      RouteTableTags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVPCRouteTable

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet1
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      AssignIpAddressesOnLaunch: true

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
      VpcId: !Ref MyVPC
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet1
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      AssignIpAddressesOnLaunch: true

  NatGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::NatGateways.NatGateway
    Properties:
      AllocateElasticIpName: natip-1
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  RouteTableAssociationPublic:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      VpcRoutingTableId: !Ref VPCRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1

  RouteTableAssociationPrivate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::RouteTableAssociation
    Properties:
      VpcRoutingTableId: !Ref VPCRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1

  RouteToInternet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Route
    Properties:
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.GatewayId
      RouteTableId: !Ref VPCRouteTable
